description:
Specification

Product Information

Product Type :Single Box Product

Product Name:70inch Modern TV Stand with Rattan Doors for TVs up to 80", Media Console with Storage Space & Cable Holes, Entertainment Center for Living Room

Place of Origin:China

Main Color:Natural Wood

Main Material:Partice Board+MDF+Pine Wood

TV or Entertainment Furniture:75 inches

TV Size Ranges:70-79 inches

Common TV Sizes:80 inches

Use Case:Primary Living Space

Wood Type:Pine

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (in.):70.87

Assembled Width (in.):15.75

Assembled Height (in.):18.90

Product Weight (lbs.):65.04

Package Size

Length (in.):42.13

Width (in.):19.69

Height (in.):7.99

Weight (lbs.):68.12

Product Features

  • [A Spacious and Organized Entertainment Hub] This TV stand is designed with ample storage space to meet all your entertainment and display needs. The generous interior provides the perfect home for your television, various electronic devices, and cherished decorative items. You can easily organize media consoles, game systems, and accessories while creating a personalized look with your favorite décor.
  • [Elegant Design with a Natural Touch] Adding a warm and organic feel to your room, the cabinet features beautifully crafted rattan doors. This design element introduces texture and a natural vibe, breaking the monotony of solid surfaces. The rattan weave allows for subtle visual interest without being overwhelming. It’s a perfect choice for those looking to add a touch of rustic charm or boho-inspired elegance to their modern home interior.
  • [Built for Stability and Durability] Supporting the entire unit are solid-wood legs that ensure remarkable sturdiness and stability. These legs provide a strong foundation, firmly anchoring the cabinet and preventing any wobbling. The use of solid wood not only contributes to the overall durability but also adds an element of authentic style. You can have complete confidence in the long-lasting reliability of this piece of furniture.
  • [Thoughtful Details for Enhanced Convenience] The design incorporates several thoughtful features for everyday ease. Dedicated cable holes are integrated into the back panel, making wire management for your TV and electronics simple and effective. The cords and a neat appearance are easily achievable. Furthermore, the exquisite handles are not just decorative; they are designed for a comfortable grip, facilitating smooth and effortless opening and closing.
  • [Robust Construction and Compatibility] Engineered for performance, this TV stand is built to securely accommodate most modern large-screen televisions. It is compatible with 80, 75, and 70-inch TV models, offering great versatility. The unit is designed with a substantial weight capacity, with the overall structure and top panel able to support up to 110 lbs. Each panel can safely hold up to 22 lbs, providing practical and reliable storage for a variety of heavier items.

Descriptions

Designed for Modern Living

This TV stand masterfully combines generous storage with elegant design to serve as the centerpiece of your entertainment area. Its spacious interior is perfectly suited for housing an 80-inch television alongside your media players and gaming consoles, while the distinctive rattan doors introduce natural texture to your decor. Practical features like integrated cable holes ensure effortless wire management, and the solid-wood legs provide unwavering stability. With a robust top capable of supporting 110 lbs, this unit delivers both enduring style and dependable function for your home.

Ample Storage for Your Entertainment Needs

This TV stand is thoughtfully designed with abundant storage space, making it an ideal solution for your living room. It provides a perfect spot to place your television, gaming consoles, streaming devices, and other electronics while offering room for displaying books.

Blending Natural Style with Practical Function

Experience the charm of nature blended with modern functionality through the elegant rattan doors. The woven texture adds visual warmth and a relaxed, organic vibe to any room setting.

Built to Support Your Home Setup

Designed with strength and versatility in mind, this TV stand can comfortably accommodate large-screen televisions up to 80 inches. The robust construction ensures the top and body can support up to 110 lbs, providing a secure base for your TV and audio equipment.
